$comment: Shared, tracked project settings for claude-kit. Local-only overrides go in settings.local.json. autoMemoryDirectory points the harness auto-memory at the git-tracked repo memory/ lane so memory commits and syncs across machines/surfaces (PLAN.md Part 5; see memory/README.md). Hooks (PLAN.md Part 7.2; scripts in plugins/core/hooks/, canonical procedures in memory/README.md): SessionStart 'startup' runs session-start-gate.sh = the freshness/git gate (absorbs the Part 0.3 git pull --ff-only, then surfaces unmerged/unpushed/dirty git + memory supersede-orphans before work; PLAN 5.3); Stop runs session-stop-push-gate.sh = blocks stopping while commits are unpushed, with anti-loop (stop_hook_active) + offline allowance (keep-tracker-current 'push immediately'); SessionEnd runs session-end-backup.sh = backup-archive.sh to the OneDrive vault + an unpushed/uncommitted reminder (PLAN 5.4). Project hooks/settings honored after the per-machine workspace-trust dialog; hooks load at session start (restart to pick up changes). A machine cloning the repo elsewhere overrides paths/CLAUDE_KIT_REPO in settings.local.json. Until Part 10 installs claude-kit as a plugin, this is the activation; the plugin's hooks/hooks.json then supersedes it (dedupe there to avoid double-fire).
